_comment: SYNCED SNAPSHOT — do not hand-edit. Regenerate with: node scripts/sync-workflow-catalog.mjs (pulls api.esy.com GET /v1/catalog/workflows). Mirrors the platform's published, versioned workflow templates.

items.name: Generate Clip Art Asset
items.description: Produce a single isolated clip-art asset from a topic and style preset, with optional background removal and full provenance.
items.shortDescription: Topic + style preset to an isolated clip-art asset.

items.name: Research Report
items.description: Synthesize a structured, sectioned research report on a topic, with a summary and cited sources, ready to reuse as a sub-workflow.
items.shortDescription: A topic to a structured, cited research report.

items.name: Research Infographic
items.description: Run a research report as a sub-workflow, then render its synthesis into a vertical infographic image. Cost and provenance roll up across both.
items.shortDescription: A topic to a research-backed infographic.
